figures.caption: Figure 1: eBandit evaluation. (A) Adversarial three-phase bandwidth trace (jitter → cliff → rocket). (B) Cumulative QoE on the adversarial trace, averaged over 10 seeds; shaded bands are±1𝜎 . (C)MeanQoE per chunk on 42 NorwayHSDPA sessions (±SEM); eBandit (warm) achieves the highest score.
